metadata.description: Visionary marketplace — design intelligence plugin for Claude Code. v1.4.0 ships Sprint 1-15: motion scoring 2.0, DINOv2 visual embeddings, MLLM judge, active governance, taste inheritance, MCP-server distribution.

plugins.name: visionary-claude
plugins.description: 202 design styles, 8-step selection, Motion Scoring 2.0 (6 sub-dim + Maturity Model), MLLM Judge tie-breaker, DINOv2 visual embeddings (opt-in), Active Governance, Taste Inheritance, @visionary/mcp-server for cross-host distribution. axe-core critique, DTCG tokens, taste flywheel. WCAG 2.2 AA + APCA. 15 frameworks, 20+ languages.
